_comment: Street-vendor dialogue for the lemonade-stand KID vendor and ice-cream-truck ADULT vendor (bug reports mreehkm9, mreeipmy). Per-NAME packs -> vendvoices.js -> window.VEND_VOICES[name][cat][i]. Cats: pitch (call-out), sale (on buy), thanks (post-buy), idle (ambient chirp). Reused refs only: LEMONADE = KID_GIRL_BRIGHT kid voice; ICECREAM = ped_m relaxed young man. All lines <=12 words.

pitch: Lemonade! Ice cold lemonade, just two dollars!
Get your fresh lemonade right here!
idle: Best lemonade in all of Westchase!

pitch: Ice cream! Get your ice cream right here!
sale: One ice cream, my friend. Enjoy it!
thanks: Thanks a lot! Stay cool out there.
idle: Nothing beats ice cream on a hot day.
